languages.text: Зарковцы, ставшие личной гвардией Вольного Торговца, держали в страхе всех, кто готов был покуситься на {mf|его|ее} власть. Им не было равных в тайных операциях, которые зачастую завершались без единого выстрела – целые лагеря врагов находили перебитыми своими же товарищами, сведенными с ума звуковыми сигналами извлеченных вокальных органов Погонщиц, тайного оружия зарковцев. В Просторе появилась присказка про тех, кто пропал без вести: "Это его тени Заркова унесли".

The Zarkovians, who had become the Rogue Trader's personal guard, terrorised all who dared challenge {mf|his|her} authority. They were peerless in covert operations, which often concluded without a single shot fired — entire enemy camps were found slaughtered by their own comrades, driven mad by the Zarkovians' secret weapon: sonic signals from the Drovers' extracted vocal organs. A saying emerged in the Expanse, namely that anyone who went missing had been "carried off by the shadows of Zarkov."
languages.original_text: Зарковцы, ставшие личной гвардией Вольного Торговца, держали в страхе всех, кто готов был покуситься на {mf|его|ее} власть. traits.locale_text: The Zarkovians, who had become the Rogue Trader's personal guard, kept all who dared to challenge {mf|his|her} authority in a state of fear. They were peerless in covert operations, which often concluded without a single shot being fired — entire enemy camps would be found slaughtered by their own comrades, driven mad by the sound signals from the Drovers' extracted vocal organs, the Zarkovians' secret weapon. A saying emerged in the Expanse about any who went missing, namely, that they had been "carried off by Zarkov's shadows."

languages.text: ローグトレーダーの親衛隊となったザルコフ人たちは、{mf|彼|彼女}の権威に挑もうとする者すべてを恐怖のうちに置いた。彼らは隠密作戦において並ぶ者なく、それはしばしば一発の銃弾も放たれることなく終結した――敵陣営は丸ごと、ザルコフ人の秘密兵器たるドローヴァーの発する音声信号によって狂わされた仲間たちの手で、惨殺された状態で発見されるのだった。エクスパンスでは、行方知れずとなった者について「ザルコフの影に連れ去られた」という言い回しが生まれた。
languages.original_text: The Zarkovians, who had become the Rogue Trader's personal guard, kept all who dared to challenge {mf|his|her} authority in a state of fear. They were peerless in covert operations, which often concluded without a single shot being fired — entire enemy camps would be found slaughtered by their own comrades, driven mad by the vocal signals of the Drovers, the Zarkovians' secret weapon. A saying emerged in the Expanse about any who went missing, namely, that they had been "carried off by Zarkov's shadows."

traits.locale_text: 冷酷で死後の贖罪を望むメロヴィアンは「ザルコフの悔い改め者」と呼ばれ、人類の敵との永遠の戦いでフォン・ヴァランシウス保護領の主要な攻撃部隊となった。

ローグトレーダーの親衛隊となったザルコフ人たちは、{mf|彼|彼女}の権威に挑もうとする者すべてを恐怖のうちに置いた。彼らは隠密作戦において並ぶ者なく、それはしばしば一発の銃弾も放たれることなく終結した――敵陣営は丸ごと、ザルコフ人の秘密兵器たるドローヴァーの発する音声信号によって狂わされた仲間たちの手で、惨殺された状態で発見されるのだった。エクスパンスでは、行方知れずとなった者について「ザルコフの影に連れ去られた」という言い回しが生まれた。

languages.text: 成为行商浪人私人卫队的扎尔科夫人，让所有胆敢挑战其权威的人都闻风丧胆。他们极其擅长隐秘作战，往往一枪未发就能完成任务——整座敌营都毁于自相残杀。这一切都是因为，敌人在他们的秘密武器拒生花的声波影响下陷入了疯狂。扩区中渐渐流传起一个说法：只要有人失踪，那一定是“被扎尔科夫的阴影带走了”。
languages.original_text: The Zarkovians, who had become the Rogue Trader's personal guard, kept all who dared to challenge {mf|his|her} authority in a state of fear. They were peerless in covert operations, which often concluded without a single shot being fired — entire enemy camps would be found slaughtered by their own comrades, driven mad by the vocal signals of the Drovers, the Zarkovians' secret weapon. A saying emerged in the Expanse about any who went missing, namely, that they had been "carried off by Zarkov's shadows."

traits.locale_text: 成为行商浪人私人卫队的扎尔科夫人，让所有胆敢挑战其权威的人都闻风丧胆。他们极其擅长隐秘作战，往往一枪未发就能完成任务——整座敌营都毁于自相残杀。这一切都是因为，敌人在他们的秘密武器拒生花的声波影响下陷入了疯狂。扩区中渐渐流传起一个说法：只要有人失踪，那一定是“被扎尔科夫的阴影带走了”。

languages.text: Les Zarkoviens, devenus la garde personnelle {mf|du libre-marchand|de la libre-marchande}, firent trembler de terreur tous ceux et celles qui osaient défier son autorité. Ils excellaient lors d'opérations secrètes, qui se concluaient souvent sans qu'ils aient à dégainer leurs armes. Des camps d'ennemis entiers s'entretuèrent ainsi, rendus fous par les cris des Chasseurs, les armes secrètes des Zarkoviens. Dans toutes les Étendues, on se mit bientôt à dire que toute personne disparue avait été « emportée par les ombres de Zarkov ».
languages.original_text: The Zarkovians, who had become the Rogue Trader's personal guard, kept all who dared to challenge {mf|his|her} authority in a state of fear. They were peerless in covert operations, which often concluded without a single shot being fired — entire enemy camps would be found slaughtered by their own comrades, driven mad by the vocal signals of the Drovers, the Zarkovians' secret weapon. A saying emerged in the Expanse about any who went missing, namely, that they had been "carried off by Zarkov's shadows."

traits.locale_text: Les Zarkoviens, devenus la garde personnelle {mf|du libre-marchand|de la libre-marchande}, firent trembler de terreur tous ceux et celles qui osaient défier son autorité. Ils excellaient lors d'opérations secrètes, qui se concluaient souvent sans qu'ils aient à dégainer leurs armes. Des camps d'ennemis entiers s'entretuèrent ainsi, rendus fous par les cris des Chasseurs, les armes secrètes des Zarkoviens. Dans toutes les Étendues, on se mit bientôt à dire que toute personne disparue avait été « emportée par les ombres de Zarkov ».

Surnommés les « Pénitents de Zarkov », les impitoyables Meroviens cherchaient la rédemption dans la mort et devinrent l'une des principales forces d'intervention du protectorat von Valancius dans la lutte éternelle contre les ennemis de l'humanité.

languages.text: Los zarkovianos, que se habían convertido en la guardia personal {mf|del|de la} Comerciante Independiente, reprimían con tácticas intimidatorias a todo el que osara cuestionar su autoridad. Destacaban en operaciones encubiertas que solían ejecutar sin efectuar un solo disparo; campamentos enteros de enemigos se mataban unos a otros, empujados a la locura por las señales auditivas de los Pastores, el arma secreta de los zarkovianos. Los habitantes de la Extensión no tardaron en acuñar una expresión para referirse a quienes desaparecían sin dejar rastro: "se los han llevado las sombras de Zarkov"».
languages.original_text: The Zarkovians, who had become the Rogue Trader's personal guard, kept all who dared to challenge {mf|his|her} authority in a state of fear. They were peerless in covert operations, which often concluded without a single shot being fired — entire enemy camps would be found slaughtered by their own comrades, driven mad by the vocal signals of the Drovers, the Zarkovians' secret weapon. A saying emerged in the Expanse about any who went missing, namely, that they had been "carried off by Zarkov's shadows."

traits.locale_text: Los zarkovianos, que se habían convertido en la guardia personal {mf|del|de la} Comerciante Independiente, reprimían con tácticas intimidatorias a todo el que osara cuestionar su autoridad. Destacaban en operaciones encubiertas que solían ejecutar sin efectuar un solo disparo; campamentos enteros de enemigos se mataban unos a otros, empujados a la locura por las señales auditivas de los Pastores, el arma secreta de los zarkovianos. Los habitantes de la Extensión no tardaron en acuñar una expresión para referirse a quienes desaparecían sin dejar rastro: "se los han llevado las sombras de Zarkov"».

languages.text: Hür Tacir'in kişisel muhafızına dönüşen Zarkovlular, otoritesine meydan okumaya cüret eden herkesi korku içinde bıraktı. Genellikle tek bir el bile ateş edilmeden sonuçlanan gizli operasyonlarda eşsizdiler. Zarkovluların gizli silahı olan Çobanların ses sinyalleriyle deliren, kendi yoldaşları tarafından katledilmiş koca düşman kampları bulunurdu. Enginlik'te kaybolanlar hakkında bir deyiş ortaya çıktı, "Zarkov'un gölgelerince alınıp götürüldükleri" söylenir oldu.
languages.original_text: The Zarkovians, who had become the Rogue Trader's personal guard, kept all who dared to challenge {mf|his|her} authority in a state of fear. They were peerless in covert operations, which often concluded without a single shot being fired — entire enemy camps would be found slaughtered by their own comrades, driven mad by the vocal signals of the Drovers, the Zarkovians' secret weapon. A saying emerged in the Expanse about any who went missing, namely, that they had been "carried off by Zarkov's shadows."

traits.locale_text: Hür Tacir'in kişisel muhafızına dönüşen Zarkovlular, otoritesine meydan okumaya cüret eden herkesi korku içinde bıraktı. Genellikle tek bir el bile ateş edilmeden sonuçlanan gizli operasyonlarda eşsizdiler. Zarkovluların gizli silahı olan Çobanların ses sinyalleriyle deliren, kendi yoldaşları tarafından katledilmiş koca düşman kampları bulunurdu. Enginlik'te kaybolanlar hakkında bir deyiş ortaya çıktı, "Zarkov'un gölgelerince alınıp götürüldükleri" söylenir oldu.

languages.text: Die Zarkovianer, die mittlerweile als persönliche Garde {mf|des Freihändlers|der Freihändlerin} dienten, versetzten alle in Angst, die es wagten, an {mf|seiner|ihrer} Autorität zu zweifeln. Sie waren unvergleichlich bei Geheimoperationen, die sie oft abschlossen, ohne einen einzigen Schuss abzufeuern. Ganze Lager von Feinden wurden von ihre eigenen Kameraden abgeschlachtet, denen die Schreie der Treiber, der Geheimwaffe der Zarkovianer, den Verstand geraubt hatten. In der Ausdehnung machte hinsichtlich verschwundener Personen eine Redensart die Runde, wonach Letztere von 'Zarkovs Schatten geholt wurden'."
languages.original_text: The Zarkovians, who had become the Rogue Trader's personal guard, kept all who dared to challenge {mf|his|her} authority in a state of fear. They were peerless in covert operations, which often concluded without a single shot being fired — entire enemy camps would be found slaughtered by their own comrades, driven mad by the vocal signals of the Drovers, the Zarkovians' secret weapon. A saying emerged in the Expanse about any who went missing, namely, that they had been "carried off by Zarkov's shadows."
